content: Phase 3: Verify literal spec extracts for §6 ideas 5-10 (done)
Phase 3: Build src/sfpe/features/common.py (causal_percentile_rank, session_vwap, anchors, session_phase, opening_range)
Phase 3: Implement Idea 8  liquidity_vacuum.py (causal flag + post-hoc realized_classification)
Phase 3: Implement Idea 9  regime_router.py (Roll cov + VR(q) + label)
Phase 3: Implement Idea 6  vpin_proxy.py (NO intra-bar splitting; document in module docstring)
Phase 3: Implement Idea 7  tpo_profile.py (30-min periods; merge if <3 bars; POC tie-break = closest to session VWAP)
Phase 3: Implement Idea 10 magnitude_projection.py (state pooling with pooling_level + state_confidence + causal terciles)
Phase 3: Build scripts/run_features.py CLI + emit per-feature CSVs into features/
Phase 3: Write tests/test_features.py with schema + sanity tests for all 6 features
Phase 3: Write tests/test_no_lookahead_features.py with 6 mandatory no-lookahead tests (one per feature) — all PASS
Phase 3: Generate spot-check diagnostics for MNQ + MCL (extending the prior ES + MGC pair)
Phase 3: Run pytest + full pipeline + produce v1.2 summary report
